    Methods in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities with parameters of type Board
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RandomFleetPlacer.place(Board board)
    Places one ship of every type in the fleet onto board, choosing random orientations and positions while respecting all of placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation)'s validation rules.
    private void
    RandomFleetPlacer.placeOneShip(Board board, ShipType type)
    Attempts to place a single ship of type on board by trying random positions until placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation) accepts one.
    Coordinate
    MachinePlayer.takeShot(Board targetBoard)
    Fires a shot on the given target board, choosing the coordinate via this player's strategy and reporting the outcome back to it.
    Constructors in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities with parameters of type Board
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    HumanPlayer(String nickname, Board ownBoard)
    Creates the human player wrapped around a board that was already built and populated during the placement phase (see Player(String, Board)).
    protected
    Player(String nickname, Board ownBoard)
    Creates a player with the given nickname wrapped around an already-existing board.

  • Uses of Board in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy

    Methods in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy with parameters of type Board
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private Coordinate
    RandomHuntStrategy.pickRandomUnshot(Board targetBoard)
    Collects every cell on the target board that has not been shot at, then returns one of them chosen uniformly at random.
    Coordinate
    IMachineShotStrategy.selectNextShot(Board targetBoard)
    Chooses the next coordinate to fire at, on the given target board.
    Coordinate
    RandomHuntStrategy.selectNextShot(Board targetBoard)
    Selects the next coordinate to fire at.
